name: MSI H310M PRO-VLH PLUS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151 - Intel H310 Chipset - Supports DDR4-2666 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 2.0 x1 - VGA - HDMI - USB 3.1 Gen1 Type-A - Parallel Port - Serial Port - PS/2 Combo Port - Gigabit LAN (H310MPROVLH)
shortName: MSI H310M PRO-VLH PLUS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1151
description: MSI H310M PRO-VLH PLUS micro ATX motherboard for budget Intel builds with legacy port support.
